name: Use Bed
desc: Sent when a player goes to sleep in a bed. Renders the sleep animation.

fields.name: playerID
fields.desc: Entity ID of the sleeping player

fields.name: bedPos
fields.desc: Head part of the bed (3 ints: x, y, z)

notes: Positions are sent as fixed-point integers (×32) and the client divides by 32 to get the actual position.

implementation.overview: Another player goes to sleep. Modules: AntiBed, BedAura (track sleeping players).
